message:
Add live Redis conformance tests for ZSET commands

Add CORE_ZSET_LIVE_STABLE_CASES with ~258 test cases covering:
- Basic ZADD/ZCARD/ZSCORE operations
- ZRANK/ZREVRANK rank queries
- ZRANGE/ZREVRANGE with WITHSCORES
- ZRANGEBYSCORE/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE with limits and exclusives
- ZCOUNT variations
- ZINCRBY increments
- ZADD options (NX, XX, GT, LT, CH, INCR)
- ZPOPMIN/ZPOPMAX with counts
- ZMSCORE multi-member scores
- ZUNIONSTORE/ZINTERSTORE with weights and aggregates
- ZDIFF/ZDIFFSTORE
- ZUNION/ZINTER
- ZINTERCARD with limits
- ZRANGESTORE
- LEX operations (ZRANGEBYLEX, ZREVRANGEBYLEX, ZLEXCOUNT)
- ZREMRANGEBYRANK/ZREMRANGEBYLEX/ZREMRANGEBYSCORE
- ZSCAN iteration
- ZMPOP setup and verification

Excludes ZMPOP result cases and some error messages due to
format/wording variations between fixture expectations and
live Redis 7.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 struct VendoredRedisOracle {
     child: Child,
     port: u16,
@@ -1975,3 +2259,23 @@ fn core_set_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
     );
     assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
 }
+
+#[test]
+fn core_zset_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
+    let cfg = HarnessConfig::default_paths();
+    let oracle_server = VendoredRedisOracle::start(&cfg);
+    let oracle = LiveOracleConfig {
+        host: "127.0.0.1".to_string(),
+        port: oracle_server.port,
+        ..LiveOracleConfig::default()
+    };
+    let report =
+        run_live_redis_diff_for_cases(&cfg, "core_zset.json", CORE_ZSET_LIVE_STABLE_CASES, &oracle)
+            .expect("zset live diff");
+    assert_eq!(
+        report.total, report.passed,
+        "mismatches: {:?}",
+        report.failed
+    );
+    assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
+}
